channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer insists defence plan ‘will keep us safe’ after Healey resigns in protest over funding – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer insists defence plan ‘will keep us safe’ after Healey resigns in protest over funding – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK defence funding crisis has been a long time coming
item.description: UK defence funding crisis has been a long time coming

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I disagree only in that I think it will probably be one of the disasters where Starmer himself had the right instincts from the start that ends up being the definitive case study.
item.description: I disagree only in that I think it will probably be one of the disasters where Starmer himself had the right instincts from the start that ends up being the definitive case study.

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg.com

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan
item.description: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Healey’s shock resignation over defence plan pushes Starmer to brink
item.description: Healey’s shock resignation over defence plan pushes Starmer to brink

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer insists defence plan ‘will keep us safe’ after minister quits over funding
item.description: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer insists defence plan ‘will keep us safe’ after minister quits over funding

item.title: BBC Politics: Healey quits as defence secretary in row over military spending
item.description: Healey quits as defence secretary in row over military spending

item.title: The Times: Even after John Healey, Keir Starmer wants to fight on - The Times
item.description: Even after John Healey, Keir Starmer wants to fight on - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain
item.description: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain
